    STOGROUP   SYSDEFLT;

SET CURRENT SCHEMA = 'SC1175';
SET CURRENT SQLID='CSMVDQE';
SET CURRENT PATH = "SYSIBM","SYSFUN","SYSPROC","SYSIBMADM","CSMVDQE" ;
CREATE DATABASE ADB175;
CREATE TABLESPACE ATS175 IN ADB175;
CREATE TABLE ATB175 (COL1 CHAR(2),
    COL2 VARCHAR(36), MASK_COLUMN DEC(11))
    IN ADB175.ATS175;
COMMIT;
INSERT INTO ATB175 VALUES('A', 'B', 1);
COMMIT;
ALTER TABLE ATB175 ADD COL3 VARCHAR(36);
COMMIT;


CREATE INDEX SC1175.AIX175
    ON SC1175.ATB175
 (COL2                 ASC);
COMMIT;
